content:
23/5 mini update:
I hid the G sheet from the tab navigation. you can still reach it via the table of contents.
- ill add Arc2 Ch5 later, maybe tonight 

in the future if theres more joke stuff like the g-sheet i will consider moving all such content to another sheet altogether while still making it accessible via the main sheet (like how it currently is with the Event Unlock Recc doc)
